data.title: Warren Buffett Said He'd Buy A 'Couple Hundred Thousand' Single Family Homes If He Could – And He'd Take Out Mortgages To Do It
What's Going On With Core Scientific Stock Today?
data.description: Core Scientific Inc (NASDAQ:CORZ) shares are trading higher. The company on Tuesday announced that CoreWeave exercised the final option of the previously announced hosting contract.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETF Sees $294M Inflow, Extending 7-Day Streak Amid Growing Market Confidence
data.description: Bitcoin spot ETFs see consistent inflows, with BlackRock's ETF leading the way. Ethereum ETFs show mixed results.

data.title: GE Vernova Vs. GE Healthcare: Betting On Power Or Medical Tech To Lead AI-Powered Future?
data.description: GE Vernova and GE Healthcare are reporting Q3 earnings, with Vernova expected to outperform due to investments in electrification and AI data centers.
